metadata.name: Mulldrifter ETB — draw two cards when it enters the battlefield
metadata.description: p1 casts Mulldrifter ({4}{U}). When Mulldrifter resolves and enters the battlefield, its ETB triggered ability fires (CR 603.2) and is placed on the stack (CR 603.3). Both players pass priority; the ETB trigger resolves (CR 608.2) and p1 draws two cards (CR 120.4). Tests the full cast-resolve-ETB-draw sequence for a creature with an enters-the-battlefield triggered ability.
metadata.generation_notes: Mulldrifter oracle: Flying; 'When this creature enters, draw two cards.'; Evoke {2}{U}. Cast for full cost {4}{U} (not evoked). SCOPE LIMITATION: This script validates that Mulldrifter's ETB draw-2 effect executes correctly, but does NOT validate CR 603.3 stack placement — the engine fires card-defined ETB triggered abilities synchronously during resolution rather than queuing them as a separate stack object requiring a priority pass. A full CR 603.3 validation would require a harness change to expose the intermediate state (trigger on stack, hand still empty). Library has exactly 2 cards (Plains, Island) — both drawn by the trigger, leaving library at 0. mana_paid uses colorless:4 for generic {4} and blue:1 for {U}.

script.step_note: p1 casts Mulldrifter; it resolves onto the battlefield; ETB trigger fires and draws two cards.

actions.description: Initial: Mulldrifter in p1 hand, library has 2 cards, stack empty

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Mulldrifter for {4}{U}; card moves from hand to stack.

actions.description: After casting: Mulldrifter on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Mulldrifter is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Mulldrifter resolves from the stack.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Mulldrifter resolves and enters the battlefield under p1's control. CR 603.2+603.3: ETB trigger 'draw two cards' fires and is placed on the stack. CR 603.6d: ETB trigger resolves — p1 draws 2 cards.

actions.note: Mulldrifter enters the battlefield; ETB trigger fires (CR 603.2), goes on stack (CR 603.3), and resolves drawing two cards (CR 120.4).

actions.description: Final: Mulldrifter on battlefield, p1 drew 2 cards (hand=2), library empty, stack empty
actions.note: CR 603.2+603.3+120.4: ETB trigger fired and resolved. p1 drew both library cards (Plains and Island). Library is now empty.
